title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm out with El Condor Pasa, when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué bonito! Do my eyes deceive me or are those
Umamusume plushies?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We could line them up with all my trophies! Think
how awesome it'd be to sit down with a plate of
nachos and check 'em all out!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Claw machines are so fun! They're a hella exciting
challenge!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But the claw never does what I tell it to... The last
time I tried, my wallet kept getting lighter, like
my money was flying away...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then when I told Grass about it, all she did was
lecture me about being more responsible. I'd
rather not have a repeat of that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa trembles a little as the memory of
Grass's reprimands resurfaces.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer, you win one for me instead!
choice_data_list: Yeah, I'll avenge your poor wallet!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ooohhh, that's my trainer! I'll be waiting for my
plushie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
